title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push, create, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the JS library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM, chat and embeddings wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user, dark/light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing a simple HTTP wrapper around Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local AI code completion via Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and docker-compose samples for running Ollama server in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight multi-agent framework letting Ollama models call tools and coordinate tasks.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and strongly-typed chat messages.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Experimental distroless container images for Ollama to minimize attack surface.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS.

title: ollama-experts
summary: Curated list of fine-tuned community models (CodeLlama-Python, SQLCoder, etc.) ready for ollama pull.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete, summarization, and note Q&A powered by Ollama.
